clusters.title: What to expect from Trump's address on Iran war as he lashes out at NATO

items.title: What to expect from Trump's address on Iran war as he lashes out at NATO
items.standfirst: President Trump is delivering a prime-time address to update the nation on the war in Iran, as he predicts the operation will continue for a few more weeks and threatens to withdraw the U.S. from NATO. Nancy Cordes has more.
items.content: President Trump is delivering a prime-time address to update the nation on the war in Iran, as he predicts the operation will continue for a few more weeks and threatens to withdraw the U.S. from NATO. Nancy Cordes has more.

items.title: Trump to deliver 'important update' on Iran war in televised speech
items.standfirst: Donald Trump will give an “important update” on the Iran war in a prime-time televised address to the American nation on Wednesday evening, which is expected to reiterate the president's timeline for rolling back US military operations in the region.
items.content: Donald Trump will give an “important update” on the Iran war in a prime-time televised address to the American nation on Wednesday evening, which is expected to reiterate the president's timeline for rolling back US military operations in the region.

items.title: Trump administration lifts sanctions on Venezuela’s interim leader
items.standfirst: The US has lifted sanctions on Delcy Rodriguez, Venezuela’s interim president, in a significant shift following the ouster of Nicolas Maduro. The move comes as relations between Washington and Caracas begin to thaw, with Rodriguez taking steps to open the country’s energy sector to US companies after assuming power earlier this year.
items.content: The US has lifted sanctions on Delcy Rodriguez, Venezuela’s interim president, in a significant shift following the ouster of Nicolas Maduro. The move comes as relations between Washington and Caracas begin to thaw, with Rodriguez taking steps to open the country’s energy sector to US companies after assuming power earlier this year.

clusters.title: Trump claims Iran wants a ceasefire, Iran says remarks are ‘false and baseless’

items.title: Trump claims Iran wants a ceasefire, Iran says remarks are ‘false and baseless’
items.standfirst: Donald Trump has claimed that Iran has asked the United States for a ceasefire -- adding that Washington would only consider it when the Strait of Hormuz reopens. Tehran, though, has denied this -- the Foreign Ministry calling Trump's remarks "baseless." It comes hours ahead of the president's primetime address to the nation. FRANCE 24's Carys Garland reports.
items.content: Donald Trump has claimed that Iran has asked the United States for a ceasefire -- adding that Washington would only consider it when the Strait of Hormuz reopens. Tehran, though, has denied this -- the Foreign Ministry calling Trump's remarks "baseless." It comes hours ahead of the president's primetime address to the nation. FRANCE 24's Carys Garland reports.

items.title: US and Iran spar on status of talks ahead of Trump address
items.standfirst: US president says he would not consider a ceasefire unless Strait of Hormuz is reopened
items.content: US president says he would not consider a ceasefire unless Strait of Hormuz is reopened

clusters.title: SpaceX Said to File Confidentially for IPO Before AI Rivals

items.title: SpaceX Said to File Confidentially for IPO Before AI Rivals
items.standfirst: SpaceX has filed confidentially for an initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, bringing billionaire Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company closer to delivering the biggest-ever listing. The company submitted its draft IPO registration to the US Securities and Exchange Commission, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public. A representative for SpaceX didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment. SpaceX could seek a valuation in the IPO of more than $1.75T, people familiar with the matter have said. The company acquired Musk’s artificial intelligence startup xAI in a deal that valued the enlarged entity at $1.25T. Bloomberg US Equity Capital Markets Reporter Anthony Hughes joins Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
items.content: SpaceX has filed confidentially for an initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, bringing billionaire Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company closer to delivering the biggest-ever listing. The company submitted its draft IPO registration to the US Securities and Exchange Commission, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public. A representative for SpaceX didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment. SpaceX could seek a valuation in the IPO of more than $1.75T, people familiar with the matter have said. The company acquired Musk’s artificial intelligence startup xAI in a deal that valued the enlarged entity at $1.25T. Bloomberg US Equity Capital Markets Reporter Anthony Hughes joins Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: SpaceX confidentially files to go public at $1.75tn, reports say
items.standfirst: Elon Musk’s rocket company could go public as early as June, Bloomberg reportsSign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inboxSpaceX has confidentially filed for an initial public offering on the US stock market, according to reports from Bloomberg and the Wall Street Journal. The IPO is set to be one of the most closely watched and highly valued listings in market history.Elon Musk’s company, which has become a dominant power in both space travel and satellite communications, could potentially seek a valuation upwards of $1.75tn. The confidential filing will give regulators a period to review and discuss the company’s financial disclosures before investors and the public are able to view them. Continue reading...
items.content: Elon Musk’s rocket company could go public as early as June, Bloomberg reportsSign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inboxSpaceX has confidentially filed for an initial public offering on the US stock market, according to reports from Bloomberg and the Wall Street Journal. The IPO is set to be one of the most closely watched and highly valued listings in market history.Elon Musk’s company, which has become a dominant power in both space travel and satellite communications, could potentially seek a valuation upwards of $1.75tn. The confidential filing will give regulators a period to review and discuss the company’s financial disclosures before investors and the public are able to view them. Continue reading...

ai_summary: SpaceX files confidentially for initial public offering
